text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 178 

PARTIAL_FLAG 

LABEL: Segment Partial County Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates that the plan benefit package (segment) covers only a portion of the county. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Blank = Plan benefit package segment covers the whole county or does not vary by segment. 
Y = Plan benefit package segment covers only a portion of the
